query:
SELECT id, gameDate, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameStatus, bracketGameId, bracketRound, 
       awayBookSpread, bookTotal, publishedToFeed, publishedModel
FROM games
WHERE sport = 'NCAAM'
  AND gameDate = '2026-03-24'
  AND (awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL OR bookTotal IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY gameDate, sortOrder;
